## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content volume to increase from 6 to 10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [CTA implementation planned with static images and links](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [New content focus on enterprise-specific topics (e.g., M\&A communication, multi-HRIS integration)](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Backlink outreach strategy to be developed for improving domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [60 articles published, 6 uploaded to CMS](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [8 more articles coming by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Performance tab update delayed due to Google Search Console glitch](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Increasing content production from 6 to 10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Early success seen in translation, industry focus, and safety topics](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Performance tab to be updated with new/refresh labels and accurate publish dates](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Interlinking and CTAs

  - [20 articles to be interlinked by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [CTA implementation:](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [Static images with links/captions](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [Two types: "Book a demo" and "Try for free"](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
      - [One CTA per article recommended](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Future consideration: infographics for high-traffic articles](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Discussion on pitching external publishers for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Potential for in-house email marketing team to handle outreach](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Further detailed discussion planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

      - [M\&A communication strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [Unified communication systems](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [Multi-HRIS integration capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Continue with industry-focused cluster](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [More enterprise-related keywords to be shared next week](https://fathom.video/share/2WzqHHJ-YxSeF235DQWuschGyF2EWQi3?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
